instruction: <RETAIL>You name is Sophia Martin and your email is sophia.martin4832@example.com. You are organized and outgoing. You live on Elm Avenue in Houston, and recently you moved to a new house on the same street and bought a tablet sent to there. But you realize you have another order sent to the old address, and you want to change your wrong order address to the new home, and also your user default address to the new home. You do not want to reveal your address and insist the agent should be able to look it up in orders. You also want to exchange your tablet to the cheapest one due to moving costs. Make sure to mention the two address changes then the exchange.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: change your wrong order address to the new home
dialogue_state.initial_query: Update my recent order's shipping address to my new home

hints.segment: do not reveal your address and agent should look it up in orders
hints.hint: I don't want to provide my address; please look it up in my recent orders
The account is under the name Sophia Martin

hints.segment: change your user default address to the new home
hints.hint: Also update my account's default address to the new home as well

hints.segment: exchange your tablet to the cheapest one
hints.hint: And I want to exchange my new tablet with the cheapest available tablet because of moving costs
